summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Nhost Todo App. All UI components, navigation, form validation, and design work perfectly. However, discovered critical network connectivity issue preventing authentication with Nhost backend.

critical_bugs.details: Both wmjonufytlptjshqrxj.nhost.run and wmjonufytlptjshqrxj.eu-central-1.nhost.run fail to resolve
critical_bugs.impact: Complete authentication failure - users cannot sign up or sign in

integration_issues.issue: Network Error when attempting to authenticate with Nhost
integration_issues.root_cause: Nhost subdomain not resolvable - backend connectivity failed
integration_issues.user_impact: Users cannot create accounts or sign in

passed_tests: Protected route redirect to Sign In when not authenticated
Sign In page loads with all required form elements and proper data-testids
Sign Up page loads with complete registration form and proper data-testids
Navigation between Sign In and Sign Up pages works perfectly
Form validation shows correct errors for password mismatch
Form validation shows correct errors for passwords under 6 characters
All data-testid attributes present on interactive elements for robust testing
Dark theme (Obsidian design) properly implemented with correct #050505 background
UI renders correctly with clean card design and indigo accent colors
Authentication error handling displays Network Error appropriately
URL routing works correctly for /signin, /signup, and protected routes
Visual design matches specifications with proper spacing and typography
action_item_for_main_agent: CRITICAL: Nhost backend connectivity completely broken. The subdomain 'wmjonufytlptjshqrxj' in both standard and regional formats cannot be resolved (ERR_NAME_NOT_RESOLVED). User needs to verify Nhost project is properly configured and active, or provide correct/working Nhost credentials. Cannot proceed with authentication testing until backend connectivity is resolved.
